_schema.description: Per-ticker tweet feed surfaced in the Research tab. Sentiment: bull | bear | neutral. ts is ISO 8601. Add as many entries per ticker as needed.

NVDA.author: Beth Kindig
NVDA.text: NVDA Blackwell allocation checks for Q2 stronger than buy-side modeling. Revenue beat setup intact, GM the only question.

NVDA.author: Stacy Rasgon
NVDA.text: Hyperscaler capex commentary mixed this earnings season. NVDA pull-through still healthy but watch ASIC mix shift @ AVGO/MRVL.

NVDA.author: Dylan Patel
NVDA.text: GB200 NVL72 systems shipping ahead of plan. CoWoS supply unlocked in Q1. Bears running out of bear cases.

NVDA.author: Gavin Baker
NVDA.text: Sovereign AI deals signed in Q1 represent ~$8B+ in 2026 revenue commitments not in consensus. Underappreciated catalyst.

NVDA.author: Short Squeeze Anonymous
NVDA.text: $NVDA chart looks toppy. RSI extended, hyperscaler digestion narrative coming back into focus on next print.

AVGO.author: Tae Kim
AVGO.text: AVGO Tomahawk 6 + Jericho 3-AI traction at hyperscalers. Networking attach to ASIC deals being underestimated by sell side.

AVGO.author: Hock Tan Watch
AVGO.text: Three new ASIC customers in Hock's $60B-90B 2027 SAM commentary. Math implies ~$25B AI rev in FY26 vs Street ~$22B.

AVGO.author: Capital Allocator
AVGO.text: VMware re-platform basically done. Software gross margin should hit 90% exit-2026. Modest tailwind from here.

AVGO.author: Bear Trap
AVGO.text: Wireless segment weak again. Apple content per phone declining. AI alone won't carry valuation if non-AI inflects negative.

META.author: Ben Thompson
META.text: Llama 4 multimodal driving real Reels engagement lift. Ad revenue per minute on Reels finally at parity with feed.

META.author: Mark Mahaney
META.text: META checks: Q2 ad pricing still firming +mid-single-digits. AI-targeting attribution improvements visible in advertiser ROAS.

META.author: Reality Labs Skeptic
META.text: Reality Labs burn now $20B+ run-rate. Quest 4 unit data weak. When does Zuck pull the plug?

META.author: Ad Tech Insider
META.text: Andromeda (META's recsys overhaul) showing measurable conversion lift across DR campaigns. ROI talk in Q1 call was real.

AAPL.author: Ming-Chi Kuo
AAPL.text: iPhone 17 Pro shipment forecast unchanged at ~95M units H2'26. iPhone 17 Air sell-through softer than internal targets.

AAPL.author: Gene Munster
AAPL.text: Services revenue trajectory + 3% installed base growth = +9-10% rev CAGR through 2027. Multiple should rerate higher.

AAPL.author: China Tech Watch
AAPL.text: AAPL China unit data Q1: -8% YoY. Huawei Mate 80 series taking high-end share. Apple Intelligence still not approved on Mainland.

AAPL.author: Sam Ro
AAPL.text: AAPL buyback: $110B authorized, ~$26B executed Q1. Pace consistent with management's 'cash neutral over time' guide.

GOOG.author: Sundar Pichai Watch
GOOG.text: Cloud growth re-accelerated to 35% YoY in Q1 vs 32% expected. Gemini 3 enterprise wins finally showing up in numbers.

GOOG.author: Search Engine Land
GOOG.text: AI Overviews now on >50% of queries. Click-through to publishers down 30% YoY. DOJ remedies hearing in June.

GOOG.author: DeepMind Insider
GOOG.text: Gemini 3 Ultra benchmarks leaked. Beats GPT-5 on coding + math by mid-single-digits. Google has the model lead now.

MSFT.author: Brent Bracelin
MSFT.text: MSFT Azure consumption growth holding ~32-34%. Copilot M365 attach now ~25% of E5 base, well ahead of plan.

MSFT.author: OpenAI Watch
MSFT.text: OpenAI restructuring revenue share with MSFT down to 15% (from 20%). Modest hit to FY27 model but offset by Azure burn-down.

MSFT.author: Capex Tracker
MSFT.text: MSFT capex annualizing $95B+ in FY26. ROI math gets harder if Azure decel from here. Need 28%+ growth to clear hurdle.

AMZN.author: AWS Insider
AMZN.text: Trainium2 demand backlog now 2 quarters out. Bedrock spend up 4x YoY. AWS finally getting AI workload share back from Azure.

AMZN.author: Retail Margins
AMZN.text: AMZN Q1 retail op margin 6.8% vs 5.5% Street. Robotics fulfillment + advertising flywheel. NA segment finally running.

AMZN.author: Andy Jassy Tracker
AMZN.text: Project Kuiper capex +$8B in 2026 but no offsetting revenue until 2027. Timing of monetization still murky.

MRVL.author: Semis Anon
MRVL.text: MRVL Trainium 3 silicon ready, AWS production ramp Q3. Inferentia partnership talks ongoing — could be the next leg.

MRVL.author: Optical DSP
MRVL.text: 800G DSP design wins at 4 hyperscalers now. 1.6T sampling Q4. Optical alone could be $3B revenue in FY27.

MRVL.author: Concentration Risk
MRVL.text: AMZN now 35%+ of MRVL revenue. Single-customer concentration is the risk no one wants to talk about.

CSCO.author: Network Insider
CSCO.text: CSCO AI infra orders ~$1.3B exiting Q2. Tracking ahead of $1B FY exit guide. Splunk attach finally showing up.

CSCO.author: Arista Bull
CSCO.text: CSCO losing share at every hyperscaler to ANET. Enterprise still durable but secular shift continues.

AMAT.author: WFE Tracker
AMAT.text: AMAT HBM tooling backlog firming. SK Hynix + Micron HBM4 capacity adds support 2026 growth above WFE peers.

AMAT.author: China Risk
AMAT.text: AMAT China revenue 35% in FY25. Reductions to <30% in FY26 baked in. Watch for any new export control surprises.

ANET.author: AI Networking
ANET.text: ANET Etherlink share at hyperscaler #2 now confirmed. Back-end network attach rate climbing. Multiple expansion warranted.

ANET.author: NVDA Spectrum-X
ANET.text: NVDA Spectrum-X taking share at meta-class deployments. ANET back-end TAM may compress over 2-3 years.

UBER.author: Mobility Insider
UBER.text: Uber+Waymo expansion to LA, Phoenix, Austin all live now. Hybrid AV/human dispatch model working — orders +40% in pilot zones.

UBER.author: Tesla Bull
UBER.text: Tesla Robotaxi launch July 2026. Uber's AV partnership story gets harder when supply disintermediates the network.

UBER.author: Delivery Margins
UBER.text: UBER Eats take rate 17.8% in Q1, +60bps YoY. Ad load + grocery attach driving structural margin.
